groups.title: Project on Sports Shoes
groups.desc:
Questions 21-26
Choose the correct answer, A, B or C.

questions.title: What did the students get from the website?

options.title: B
options.content: ideas to fulfil the project requirements

questions.title: What did Martin use as an example of the research?

options.title: A
options.content: He downloaded a diagram from the internet.

options.title: B
options.content: He took apart his old shoes.

options.title: C
options.content: He borrowed a sample from the tutor.

questions.title: According to Martin, what other factors should be considered while designing shoes?
What proportion of the essay does Martin suggest Rosie do?
What will Martin and Rosie do this weekend?
What help can the students get from the tutor?

groups.question_title: What decision do the students make about each of the following parts of their essay?
groups.desc:
Questions 27-30
What decision do the students make about each of the following parts of their essay?
Choose FOUR answers from the box and write the correct letter, A-F, next to Questions 27-30.

transcript.speaker: Rosie
transcript.en: OK, Martin.

transcript.speaker: Rosie
transcript.en: Before we plan our presentation for the project, let's discuss what we've done so far.

transcript.speaker: Martin
transcript.en: OK, Rosie.

transcript.speaker: Martin
transcript.en: When the tutor gave us the theme of sports shoes to base our project on, I was not all that interested.

transcript.speaker: Martin
transcript.en: But I'm starting to get into it.

transcript.speaker: Martin
transcript.en: I've pretty much finished the research stage.

transcript.speaker: Rosie
transcript.en: Me too.

transcript.speaker: Rosie
transcript.en: At first, I had no idea what to write for the essay, so I asked some senior students for advice, and they gave me some websites to look at, where I found some articles on sports shoes and got some ideas.

transcript.speaker: Martin
transcript.en: Yes, I searched for pictures of sports shoes online and applied them in my research.

transcript.speaker: Martin
transcript.en: It's beneficial.

transcript.speaker: Rosie
transcript.en: Right.

transcript.speaker: Martin
transcript.en: According to the project's requirements, we have to find an example for the research, and I've just completed this part.

transcript.speaker: Rosie
transcript.en: What example do you use?

transcript.speaker: Rosie
transcript.en: You said you'd like to borrow a sample from the tutor.

transcript.speaker: Martin
transcript.en: That was my first thought.

transcript.speaker: Martin
transcript.en: But I realized maybe the tutor wanted us to do our own thing, not copy.

transcript.speaker: Martin
transcript.en: Then I cut off my old sports shoes and separated them into different parts so that I could make a careful study of the internal structure.

transcript.speaker: Rosie
transcript.en: It's a good idea.

transcript.speaker: Martin
transcript.en: Then I drew a diagram which could show precisely each part of the shoes.

transcript.speaker: Martin
transcript.en: Through the research, I've found that sports shoes nowadays have significantly improved.

transcript.speaker: Rosie
transcript.en: What do you mean?

transcript.speaker: Martin
transcript.en: For example, designers these days use better raw materials, which are not only durable but also make the skin of feet breathe more easily.

transcript.speaker: Martin
transcript.en: Moreover, they also take into account the factor of foot shape.

transcript.speaker: Martin
transcript.en: But they've ignored the foot movement, which is essential for sportspeople.

transcript.speaker: Rosie
transcript.en: Interesting!

transcript.speaker: Rosie
transcript.en: I think I can add this to the essay.

transcript.speaker: Martin
transcript.en: OK.

transcript.speaker: Martin
transcript.en: Given that you've got most ideas for the essay so far, I think you can mainly finish the written sections of the project, and I can take care of every detail of the presentation.

transcript.speaker: Martin
transcript.en: Does this appeal to you?

transcript.speaker: Rosie
transcript.en: I'm OK with that.

transcript.speaker: Rosie
transcript.en: I prefer written work to giving a presentation.

transcript.speaker: Martin
transcript.en: That's good.

transcript.speaker: Martin
transcript.en: What do we need to do next?

transcript.speaker: Rosie
transcript.en: Well, according to the plan, we will give a presentation next Wednesday.

transcript.speaker: Rosie
transcript.en: And before that, we'll have to finish the questionnaire left by the tutor, and I think we can handle it this weekend.

transcript.speaker: Martin
transcript.en: OK.

transcript.speaker: Martin
transcript.en: Do we have to do some face-to-face interviews?

transcript.speaker: Rosie
transcript.en: The tutor said that would be for the next assignment, not this one.

transcript.speaker: Martin
transcript.en: OK.

transcript.speaker: Martin
transcript.en: Then about the presentation, I remember in the last tutorial, the tutor advised us to use some slides to make the presentation more attractive.

transcript.speaker: Martin
transcript.en: But I'll also need a whiteboard because I like writing or drawing when necessary.

transcript.speaker: Rosie
transcript.en: We can ask our tutor for help.

transcript.speaker: Rosie
transcript.en: He might have one and can lend it to us.

transcript.speaker: Martin
transcript.en: Right.

transcript.speaker: Rosie
transcript.en: Well, Martin, let's go through the draft of the essay together and see whether there're any changes we have to make.

transcript.speaker: Martin
transcript.en: OK, Rosie.

transcript.speaker: Martin
transcript.en: I think the summary gives a brief and precise description of the project's main ideas.

transcript.speaker: Martin
transcript.en: Where will it go?

transcript.speaker: Rosie
transcript.en: I'd like to put it at the end of the essay.

transcript.speaker: Rosie
transcript.en: What do you think?

transcript.speaker: Martin
transcript.en: Good idea.

transcript.speaker: Martin
transcript.en: And I think the result part describes in detail what the research has achieved.

transcript.speaker: Martin
transcript.en: But I'm wondering whether it should go directly behind the part of the research, as they are closely related.

transcript.speaker: Rosie
transcript.en: Yes, I think that'd be better.

transcript.speaker: Rosie
transcript.en: I'll move this part.

transcript.speaker: Rosie
transcript.en: Then the conclusion, I'm wondering whether I've used too many technical terms, which other students might struggle with.

transcript.speaker: Martin
transcript.en: You're right.

transcript.speaker: Martin
transcript.en: Not everyone will be familiar with the subject.

transcript.speaker: Rosie
transcript.en: So I think we could replace them with straightforward explanations.

transcript.speaker: Martin
transcript.en: I agree.

transcript.speaker: Martin
transcript.en: Lastly, the discussion, I like this part as it presents a series of questions that we can talk about with other students after the presentation.

transcript.speaker: Rosie
transcript.en: Yes, but I think the questions look messy and need to be better sequenced.

transcript.speaker: Rosie
transcript.en: Maybe we could arrange them in a list.

transcript.speaker: Martin
transcript.en: OK, that'd be better.

transcript.speaker: Rosie
transcript.en: All right.

transcript.speaker: Rosie
transcript.en: That's all about the essay.

transcript.speaker: Rosie
transcript.en: Now let's talk about the presentation ...

21.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 website；提示词为 students、get。
题目解析：开篇在稍作背景介绍后，定位词由女生引出，接着她提到 “… where I found some articles on sports shoes ...”，与 C 选项信息一致，其中 articles 是 information 的具象化体现。随后男生表示同意 “Yes, I searched for pictures of sports shoes online ...”，其中 pictures 也是 C 选项 information 的具象化体现，online 对应题干的 website，可确认 C 选项为正确答案。注意，A 选项 advice from others 并非是从网上获取的信息，属于干扰项；女生有提到 B 选项的 ideas，但她并未提到 fulfil the project requirements，可判断该选项信息不完整，为干扰项。

22.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 example；提示词为 Martin。
题目解析：定位词原词重现后，女生先提出 borrow a sample from the tutor，与 C 选项信息一致，但随后被男生否定 “That was my first thought. But I realized maybe the tutor wanted us to do our own thing, not copy.”，可排除 C 选项。男生提到 “Then I cut off my old sports shoes and separated them into different parts ...”，与 B 选项信息一致，可判断 B 选项为正确答案。最后男生还提到 “Then I drew a diagram ...”，说明 diagram 并不是在网上下载的，与 A 选项信息不一致，可判断其为干扰项。

23.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 designing shoes；提示词为 Martin、other factors。
题目解析：定位词以 designers 的形式出现，不难听出。原文先后提到 designers these days use better raw materials 和 they also take into account the factor of foot shape，说明设计师已经考虑到 raw materials 和 foot shape 这两个因素了，可判断 A、C 选项为干扰项。最后男生提到 “But they've ignored the foot movement ...”，其中 ignored 对应题干的 should be considered，可判断 B 选项为正确答案。

24.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 essay；提示词为 proportion、Martin suggest Rosie。
题目解析：定位词原词重现后，男生提到 “… I think you can mainly finish the written sections of the project ...”，其中 written sections 即为 essay；mainly 对应 B 选项的 almost all，因此 B 选项为正确答案。男生随后还提到 “… I can take care of every detail of the presentation.”，其中 every detail 指的是 presentation 的细节，而非 essay 的，此外这也不是女生负责的任务，可判断 C 选项为干扰项。A 选项在原文未提及。

25.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 this weekend；提示词为 Martin and Rosie、this weekend。
题目解析：上一题结束后，通过提问 “What do we need to do next?” 可以定位到该题。先听到 according to the plan，A 选项 carry out a plan 信息有偏差，可排除 A 选项。接着听到 “… we'll have to finish the questionnaire left by the tutor, and I think we can handle it this weekend,”，其中 questionnaire 对应 C 选项的 questions，this weekend 原词重现，因此 C 选项为正确答案。之后男生提出疑问 “Do we have to do some face-to-face interviews?”，但随即被女生否定 “The tutor said that would be for the next assignment, not this one.”，可判断 B 选项为干扰项。

26.analysis:
听前预测：提示词为 help、students、tutor。
题目解析：本题定位信息不明显。上一题结束后，原文提到 “… in the last tutorial, the tutor advised us ...”，部分考生听到 tutorial 和 advised 可能会误选 B、C 选项。注意，tutorial 和 advice 并非学生可以从导师那里获得的帮助，这两个选项皆为干扰项。接着男生提到 “But I'll also need a whiteboard ...”，其中 whiteboard 对应 A 选项的 equipment，随后女生回应 “We can ask our tutor for help. He might have one and can lend it to us,”，其中 tutor、help 都是题干原词，可判断 A 选项为正确答案。

27.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 summary。
题目解析：定位词由男生引出 “I think the summary gives a brief and precise description of the project's main ideas.”，句中没有与选项相关的信息。继续往下听，听到女生提到 “I'd like to put it at the end of the essay”，其中 at the end of 与 F 选项的 the last part 信息一致，接着男生也表示同意，可判断 F 选项为正确答案。

28.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 result。
题目解析：定位词仍由男生引出 “I think the result part describes in detail what the research has achieved.”，其中 describes in detail 与 C 选项 give a detailed example 信息存在偏差，可排除 C 选项。随后男生通过转折词引出答案句 “… it should go directly behind the part of the research ...”，女生表示同意 “Yes, I think that'd be better. I'll move this part.”，其中 move this part 与 D 选项 change to another part 信息一致，可确认 D 选项为正确答案。

29.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 conclusion。
题目解析：上一题结束后，定位词原词重现。接着女生先后提到 too many technical terms、struggle with，随后男生提到 not ... familiar with，这些信息都表明难度大，学生不容易理解，对应 E 选项。最后女生提到 “So I think we could replace them with straightforward explanations,”，其中 straightforward 对应 E 选项的 simple，可确认 E 选项为正确答案。

30.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 discussion。
题目解析：定位词原词重现后，男生先提到 “… I like this part as it presents a series of questions that we can talk about with other students after the presentation.”，句中没有与选项相关的信息。继续往下听，听到女生提到 “… but I think the questions look messy and need to be better sequenced. Maybe we could arrange them in a list.”，其中 better sequenced、arrange them in a list 对应 A 选项 change the layout，可确认 A 选项为正确答案。
